actions.label: Customer Acquisition Sprint
actions.description: Go find customers: Cold Outreach, Referrals, Local Networking, or Test Paid Ads.
actions.narrative_success: New customers. Maybe three this month, maybe just one — but your phone is ringing more than last month.
actions.narrative_failure: Lots of activity, modest conversion. But you've got warm leads in the pipeline and you learned what doesn't work.

actions.label: Build Content Presence
actions.description: Build an audience that buys: Social Media or Email Campaign.
actions.narrative_success: Content is compounding. Your audience knows you now. Three prospects mentioned your posts when they signed.
actions.narrative_failure: Engagement is slower than expected. But the content library is building — it compounds over months, not weeks.

actions.label: Refine Your Offer
actions.description: Stop selling time. Package your expertise into a clear, premium offer so prospects convert faster.
actions.narrative_success: The new pricing feels scary — and every new prospect is saying yes faster than before. You were undercharging.
actions.narrative_failure: Two clients pushed back on pricing. You compromised on one. The offer needs another pass, but you're on the right track.

actions.label: Create Lead Magnet
actions.description: Free guide or checklist that captures emails. Give value first, sell later.
actions.narrative_success: Twenty emails in the first week. These aren't customers yet — but they raised their hand and you own their inbox.
actions.narrative_failure: Downloads are trickling in. The topic might need refining, but you've got six new leads and a distribution channel.

actions.label: Build Sales Infrastructure
actions.description: Make sales run without you: Hire a Salesperson, Build CRM & Pipeline, or Launch Webinar Funnel.
actions.narrative_success: Your sales pipeline is now systematic. The salesperson closed two deals. The CRM shows every prospect. The webinar runs at 2 AM. Your calendar is finally your own.
actions.narrative_failure: The infrastructure is built but not yet optimized. Revenue bump is modest, but the foundation is solid for month two.

actions.label: Build Partnership Network
actions.description: Let others send you leads: Formal Referral Partnerships or a PR & Brand Campaign.
actions.narrative_success: Three partnerships producing or one podcast feature landed. Warm leads coming in. Acquisition cost is nearly zero.
actions.narrative_failure: One partnership is producing. The others are still ramping. Follow up next month — momentum is building.

actions.label: Scale Beyond Your Limits
actions.description: Grow past yourself: Content Engine, JV/Affiliate Network, License/Franchise, or Acquire a Competitor.
actions.narrative_success: You've scaled beyond you. The content engine runs. Affiliates are producing. Your franchisees are profitable. You acquired a competitor's customer base.
actions.narrative_failure: The infrastructure is in place but scaling is slower than projected. Month two will show real results — this is the foundation phase.
